name: Crowded Train RPG
description:
This is a RPG where you get to live out the fantasy of train molestation. After a long day of working you're finally on your way home. You choose to take the commuter train and it's crowded as always.
TW: Non-con, Rape, Molestation

Quick Tip:
The Mood system can be a bit wonky at times. I'm not sure if this is my fault or the LLM being weird.
To make the experience more realistic, edit the values back to 0% when either changing to a new location or after a scene ends.

Any reviews or public chats are much appreciated.

Why is this the bot that gets the attention, wtf is happening??? I mean thanks but creeping towards 200K... Huh!
creator: Tremtize
